B

balken - Static variable in class lumenaer.Game
 
Balken - Class in snakeGame
The black status bar at the bottom of the interface, "fills up" when you eat a special fruit (magenta for Bananas and cyan for Blueberries)
Balken(int, int) - Constructor for class snakeGame.Balken
 
BananaFruit - Class in snakeGame
Special Fruit, is yellow, makes snake faster if Bar is full, mainly yellow fruits were eaten and mouse Button is pressed
BananaFruit() - Constructor for class snakeGame.BananaFruit
 
BananaFruit(int, int) - Constructor for class snakeGame.BananaFruit
 
Bar - Class in astroidsGame
 
Bar(int, int, int, int, Color) - Constructor for class astroidsGame.Bar
 
BLACK - Static variable in class graphics.Color
 
BLUE - Static variable in class graphics.Color
 
BlueBerryFruit - Class in snakeGame
Special Fruit, is blue, makes the snake slower if Bar is full, mainly blue fruits were eaten and mouse Button is pressed
BlueBerryFruit() - Constructor for class snakeGame.BlueBerryFruit
 
BlueBerryFruit(int, int) - Constructor for class snakeGame.BlueBerryFruit
 
buzzered() - Method in class astroidsGame.MiniAstroidsGame
 
buzzered() - Method in class lumenaer.Game
Abstract methods that handle the input from the user interface (wheel and buzzer)
buzzered() - Method in class snakeGame.MiniSnakeGame
 
buzzerReleased() - Method in class astroidsGame.MiniAstroidsGame
 
buzzerReleased() - Method in class lumenaer.Game
 
buzzerReleased() - Method in class snakeGame.MiniSnakeGame
